data.title: SSL/TLS Encryption
data.description: Ensures secure data transmission across the network.
data.technical_spec: Implements TLS 1.3 for all web communications to enhance privacy and data integrity.

data.title: WAF Protection
data.description: Web Application Firewall to mitigate threats like SQL injection and XSS attacks.
data.technical_spec: Advanced WAF systems monitor and filter HTTP requests to block malicious traffic.

data.title: Regular Security Audits
data.description: Frequent security assessments to identify and rectify vulnerabilities.
data.technical_spec: Conducts both automated and manual security audits including penetration testing.

data.title: DDoS Mitigation
data.description: Protection against Distributed Denial of Service attacks.
data.technical_spec: Employs anti-DDoS services by providers like Akamai to counteract traffic overloads.

data.title: Endpoint Security
data.description: Secures devices accessing the network to prevent unauthorized access.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes advanced endpoint protection protocols and antivirus solutions.
